# Hind AI

> A calm, theme-aware digital gurukul and library of ancient Indian scriptures powered by AI.

## Key Features
- **Scripture Shelves**: Direct access to Vedas, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita, Puranas, and Epics.
- **Guru AI**: Streaming-based context-aware scriptural question answering.
- **Sadhana**: Mantra Japa counter and digital meditation tools.
- **Sanskrit Studio**: Translators, transliterations, dictionaries, and vocabulary analyzers.
- **Dharma Guide**: Structured context on rituals, festivals, and practices.

## Primary Routes
- [Library Shelf](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/contents): Explore cataloged ancient texts.
- [Guru AI Guide](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/ai-guide): Interact with the scriptural assistant.
- [Daily Sadhana](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/sadhana): Use the digital japa count tool.
- [Vision Analysis](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/vision): Upload images of scripts and temples.
- [Dharma Guide](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/dharma): Guidelines on spiritual paths.
- [Stotras Library](https://hindai-nine.vercel.app/stotras): Chant and listen to devotional hymns.
